title: Recovery For Capesizes
summary:
Main
The Baltic Dry Index extended gains into a sixth session on Tuesday as the capesizes continued to recover. For the commodities, yesterday's session saw losses dominating the activities, with a stronger dollar among the contributing factors. By Ulf Bergman
Macro/Geopolitics
The US dollar continued to strengthen yesterday as markets envisaged that the Federal Reserve would have less room to manoeuvre for monetary easing amid higher inflation expectations.
